## Prohibited Claims

Do not claim that historical or simulated performance proves future results.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Point-in-time data is defined.
- [ ] Costs, spread, slippage, and latency assumptions are documented.
- [ ] Baseline comparisons are defined.
- [ ] Paper-trading criteria are defined.
